creator: mike.rota@icloud.com
text:
Currently running nut 2.8.0_23 compiled from ports. I noticed that any timers that I set in `upssched.conf` occupy ~90+% CPU usage of a single core indefinitely while a timer is running. Occurs with both `upshid-ups` and `dummy-ups` drivers.

I filed a bug report on the project’s GitHub page. According to the reply, this bug may have already been fixed but a release has not yet occurred.
